title: Invasion of the Internet Impostors
summary: A restored Issue 8 feature on ELIZA, Turing tests, Markov-chain personas, and early fears that online programs could pass as people.
releaseNote: Restored Invasion of the Internet Impostors from Internet Underground Issue 8 with a mobile-first reader page and raw-source link.
restorationNote: The raw article remains available unchanged at its source path.
